CustomField.description: Checks settings to know if user is marked as out of office or not.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND(OutOfOfficeFrom__c <= TODAY(), ISBLANK(OutOfOfficeTo__c)) , true, IF(AND(OutOfOfficeFrom__c <= TODAY(), OutOfOfficeTo__c >= TODAY()) , true , false) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Validates users ooo date settings to know if user is currently marked as out of office or not.
CustomField.label: Is Out Of Office
